metadata.description: The Unified Operations Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text.title: Project Number
text.description: The Project Number of the new FinOps Project

text_2.title: Parent Processing Log GUID
text_2.description: The Processing Log that will be used as Parent

number.title: Project Type
number.description: The Project Type that is used to group the Level 1 Calculation Position Nodes

text_3.title: Project Type Name
text_3.description: The Project Type Name (only for debugging purposes)

text_5.title: Company GUID
text_5.description: The Company selected for the Quotation / Calculation

parameters.$filter: _hso_calculationid_value eq @{triggerBody()['text_1']} and hso_projecttype eq @{triggerBody()['number']} and hso_positionelementtype eq 100000006 and hso_measurementproduct eq true

Update_Calculation_Position.description: Assign FinOps Product Variant Number (required for Project Item Planning)

parameters.request/url: https://@{parameters('EnvVar | Unified Operations Instance (hso_EnvVarUnifiedOperationsInstance)')}/data/ProductMasterStyles?$filter=ProductMasterNumber eq '@{variables('varBaseServiceItemNumber')}' and ProductStyleId eq '@{variables('varStyleID')}'

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

parameters.request/url: https://@{parameters('EnvVar | Unified Operations Instance (hso_EnvVarUnifiedOperationsInstance)')}/data/ProductMasterColors?$filter=ProductMasterNumber eq '@{variables('varBaseServiceItemNumber')}' and ProductColorId eq '@{body('Substring_of_Project_Number')}'

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')
